case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. DUSTIN GUINEE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GUINEE, DUSTIN GUINEE, ROGER GUINEE, CATHY DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-23-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-08-2004
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY : VICKI GROSS. # 5525 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2004 CONTINUED TO OCT-13-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). SEP-01-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-23-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-22-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-13-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
